expected.notes: Both documents report full-time status consistently so comparison status is match not mismatch; rule should not fire despite CPT context being present.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'cpt_fulltime_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.full_time mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
